description_long: This bungalow features a striking modern facade with a geometric pattern of black and natural wood panels, accented by green trim at the corners. The front side includes a large rectangular window and a glass door, both set within the angular wood and black design. The roof is flat and solid black, giving the structure a sleek, contemporary appearance. The side and rear walls continue the geometric motif, with the rear wall displaying a long, narrow window. The building sits on a base of green grass and gray pavers, suggesting an urban or suburban setting. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a bold contrast between the wood and black surfaces.
description: A modern bungalow with a flat black roof, geometric wood and black paneling, large windows, and a glass door, set on a grassy base with pavers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a glass door, a large window, and the bold geometric wood and black facade.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by the solid black wall and the edge of the flat roof, with minimal visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a long, narrow window set within the geometric wood and black paneling.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a solid black wall and the edge of the flat roof visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and rear windows
